title: schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. purshianus
intro: Schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. purshianus, also known as Western Tule or Pursh's bulrush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the cattail family (Typhaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. purshianus include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically to treat skin irritations and internally to treat various health conditions.
